nasb.text: Then Menahem son of Gadi went up from Tirzah and came to Samaria, and struck Shallum son of Jabesh in Samaria, and killed him and became king in his place.

esv.text: Then Menahem the son of Gadi came up from Tirzah and came to Samaria, and he struck down Shallum the son of Jabesh in Samaria and put him to death and reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 迦底的兒子米拿現從得撒上去，到撒瑪利亞攻擊雅比人沙龍，把他殺死，接續他作王。

ccb.text: 迦底的儿子米拿现从得撒去撒玛利亚杀了沙龙，篡位做了以色列王。
